concepts.name: knownPeers seeding must precede any contacts-store write it protects
isAllowedDmSender signature and purity are frozen (ADR-002 AC-SEC-13)
npubToPubkeyHex is the single validity source for npub decoding
AddContactModal maps AddContactResult error codes to translated copy without altering error semantics
pages/ -> components/ -> context/ -> lib/ strict import hierarchy
Every new/reworded copy key has both an en and a de entry
Out-of-band lp_knownPeers_v1 writes must notify long-lived walled-garden subscribers so cached knownPeers refs refresh without a reload
concepts.note: Any future out-of-band writer of lp_knownPeers_v1 MUST call notifyKnownPeersChanged(); any new long-lived subscriber caching loadKnownPeers() MUST add knownPeersRevision to its refresh-effect deps.
